title: ctenitis kinabaluensis var. crassisquama
intro: Ctenitis kinabaluensis var. crassisquama is a rare and endemic fern species found in Borneo, characterized by its distinctive fronds and unique growth habits. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ctenitis kinabaluensis var. crassisquama are attributed to its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into various herbal remedies, such as tea infusions, tinctures, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
